condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.

open_items.text: Verify accessibility and coherence of recall record 25d3fe04-1478-529a-87ef-67a0c58c587e before closing the pilot seed cycle.

recovered_action_object.response: Autonomy pilot seeded. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved: confirm that the recall target record is accessible and its contents are coherent before the next reasoning cycle. A single wake has been scheduled to resolve this item, pulling the specified recall record as context.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the open item by inspecting recall record 25d3fe04-1478-529a-87ef-67a0c58c587e and confirming its contents are accessible and coherent, then close the pilot seed cycle.
